who: medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 10-20 invoices/month
offer: For medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual coding causes cash flow gaps. We automate the conversion of billing codes into insurance claims instead of manual coding and submission processes.
problem: Manual conversion of medical billing codes into insurance claims leads to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing specialists
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to medical billing specialists with demo video
Participate in community forums for sharing tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface for manual entry and error-checking for billing codes on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
